en.extract:
The long-tailed fantail (Rhipidura opistherythra) is a species of bird in the family Rhipiduridae. It is endemic to the Tanimbar Islands, where its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''long-tailed fantail''' ('''''Rhipidura opistherythra''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Rhipiduridae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the [[Tanimbar Islands]], where its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
